description: Policy-gated approval stages. Configure under `policies.requireApprovalAtStages` in project.yml.

stages.description: When listed under `policies.requireApprovalAtStages`, the orchestrator pauses at the boundary into the `planning` stage and emits a `waiting_for_approval` event. A human must approve via `vibe approvals decide` (or the dashboard) before the run continues.

When listed under `policies.requireApprovalAtStages`, the orchestrator pauses at the boundary into the `architecting` stage and emits a `waiting_for_approval` event. A human must approve via `vibe approvals decide` (or the dashboard) before the run continues.

When listed under `policies.requireApprovalAtStages`, the orchestrator pauses at the boundary into the `executing` stage and emits a `waiting_for_approval` event. A human must approve via `vibe approvals decide` (or the dashboard) before the run continues.

When listed under `policies.requireApprovalAtStages`, the orchestrator pauses at the boundary into the `validating` stage and emits a `waiting_for_approval` event. A human must approve via `vibe approvals decide` (or the dashboard) before the run continues.

When listed under `policies.requireApprovalAtStages`, the orchestrator pauses at the boundary into the `reviewing` stage and emits a `waiting_for_approval` event. A human must approve via `vibe approvals decide` (or the dashboard) before the run continues.

When listed under `policies.requireApprovalAtStages`, the orchestrator pauses at the boundary into the `fixing` stage and emits a `waiting_for_approval` event. A human must approve via `vibe approvals decide` (or the dashboard) before the run continues.

When listed under `policies.requireApprovalAtStages`, the orchestrator pauses at the boundary into the `verifying` stage and emits a `waiting_for_approval` event. A human must approve via `vibe approvals decide` (or the dashboard) before the run continues.
